headline: Meta Display AI assistant — go beyond voice answers with real computer use

site_brief.audience: people evaluating AI assistants for Meta smart glasses and display-style wearable workflows
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Meta Display AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Meta Display AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can become the action layer for hands-free Meta Display workflows beyond simple voice answers

summary: An indexable, hands‑on use‑case page showing how Super becomes the action layer for Meta Display and smart‑glasses workflows — operating real computers, reusing a computer‑use cache, and helping wearable AI move from novelty to daily utility.
